nodes.name: Schedule: Daily 9am
nodes.notes: Fires every day at 9:00 AM. Adjust timezone in n8n Settings → General → Timezone.

nodes.name: Read Content Calendar
nodes.notes: SETUP: Create sheet tab 'Content_Calendar' with columns: Date | Platform | Caption | Image_URL | Status | Posted_At | Row_Number

nodes.name: Build Buffer Payload
nodes.notes: SETUP: Replace REPLACE_WITH_BUFFER_PROFILE_ID_INSTAGRAM etc. with your Buffer profile IDs. Find them at https://api.bufferapp.com/1/profiles.json

nodes.name: Post via Buffer API
nodes.notes: SETUP: Get your Buffer access token from https://buffer.com/developers/api — replace REPLACE_WITH_BUFFER_ACCESS_TOKEN

nodes.name: Error Handler
nodes.notes: Catches errors from Buffer API or Sheets. Connect error outputs here.

motionElevation.description:
SETUP README:

1. GOOGLE SHEETS SETUP:
   Create a sheet named 'Content_Calendar' with these columns:
   Date | Platform | Caption | Image_URL | Status | Posted_At
   
   - Date: Use YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g. 2024-03-15) or DD/MM/YYYY
   - Platform: instagram / linkedin / twitter / tiktok
   - Caption: Your post text
   - Image_URL: Direct link to image (optional, leave blank for text-only)
   - Status: Set to 'Ready' when post should go out. 'Draft' = skip.
   - Posted_At: Auto-filled by workflow

2. BUFFER SETUP:
   - Sign up at buffer.com and connect your social accounts
   - Get your Access Token: buffer.com/developers/api → OAuth
   - Get Profile IDs: GET https://api.bufferapp.com/1/profiles.json?access_token=YOUR_TOKEN
   - Replace REPLACE_WITH_BUFFER_ACCESS_TOKEN in 'Post via Buffer API' node
   - Replace REPLACE_WITH_BUFFER_PROFILE_ID_INSTAGRAM etc. in 'Build Buffer Payload' node

3. CREDENTIALS:
   - Google Sheets OAuth2: n8n Settings → Credentials
   - SMTP: n8n Settings → Credentials

4. TIMEZONE:
   - Set your n8n instance timezone to match your posting schedule
   - n8n Settings → General → Timezone

SUPPORTED PLATFORMS: Instagram, LinkedIn, Twitter/X, TikTok (via Buffer)
